zh.lifeSummary: Lady Hertford Mnn於1200年出生在威爾士。她和Walter Hertford至少有1個女兒。她去世於1240年在英國威爾斯享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Hertford Mnn于1200年出生在威尔士。她和Walter Hertford至少有1个女儿。她去世于1240年在英国威尔斯享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mnn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyung, Young, Kyong, Byong, Sung, Sun, Byoung, Eun, Hong, Yong, Choong, Joon, Byung, Chang, Chung, Pyong, Kyong Su, Myong, Sik, Eun-Young, Hyun Sook, Jeong, Kyung Soo, Kyung Won.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 閔, meaning ‘bad luck, pity, or sorrow’ in ancient Chinese: from Min (閔), the posthumous title of the Duke Min of Lu, the 17th ruler of the state of Lu (located in present-day Shandong province). After only two years on the throne (661–660  BC ) he was murdered. His successor gave him the posthumous title 閔 (Min), which became established as a surname for his descendants.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the Chinese surname 文, see   Wen   2.

variants.name: Wen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Han, Cheng, Jin, Li, Yen, Yong, Chen, Chih-Hung, Chin, Hong, Jian, Jung, Long, Huan, Hung, Hung Chi, Ly, Quan.

Mandarin form of the surname 溫, meaning ‘warm’ in Chinese: (i) from Wen (溫), the name of an ancient state during the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ). During the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) this state was annexed by the state of Di and the prince of Wen fled to the state of Wey (located around present-day Hebi and Xinxiang in Henan province). His descendants acquired 溫, the name of their original state, as their surname. (ii) from the placename Wen (溫), the name of a fief granted to Wen Ji (溫季), an official in the state of Jin (located mainly in present-day Shanxi province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) from the Chi Wen (叱溫), Wen Pen (溫盆), and Wen Gu (溫孤) families of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iv) from the personal name of Wen Sheng (溫昇), who went into exile and changed his original surname, Liu (劉), to Wen 溫 after his father, Liu Yicong (劉易從), an official in the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ), suffered persecution and death.

variants.name: Ming
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Chen, Fung, Hing, Ming, Tzu, Wing, Xing, Chi, Choo, Fan, Guang, Guo Wei.

English: possibly from a shortened form of Mingay, from the Breton personal name Menguy (composed of the Breton elements men ‘stone’ and ki ‘dog’). The personal name was introduced to England after the Conquest by Breton followers of the Normans.

Chinese: Mandarin or Cantonese form of the surname 明: (i) from the personal name Ming (明), which was the style name of Meng Ming Shi (孟明視), a famous general in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ) by the Yi Dou Juan (壹鬥眷) family, who were members of the Xianbei ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Hertford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hereford
meanings: English: habitational name from Hertford (Hertfordshire) (in which the t was lost early, as in the modern pronunciation Harford), Hereford (Herefordshire), or Harford (Devon, Gloucestershire). The Devon and Herefordshire placenames derive from Old English here ‘army’ + ford ‘ford’, while the Gloucestershire and Hertfordshire placenames derive from Old English heorot ‘hart, stag’ + ford.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Hertford Mnn was born in 1200, in Wales. She had at least 1 daughter with Walter Hertford. She died in 1240, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Hertford Mnn est née en 1200, à Galles. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Walter Hertford. Elle est décédée en 1240, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Hertford Mnn wurde 1200 in Wales geboren. Sie hatte mit Walter Hertford mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1240 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Hertford Mnn è nata il nel 1200 nel Galles. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Walter Hertford. Morì nel 1240, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Hertford Mnnは1200年にウェールズで生まれた。彼女はWalter Hertfordとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1240年にイギリスウェールズで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Hertford Mnn(은)는 1200년 웨일스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Walter Hertford(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1240년 영국 웨일스에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Hertford Mnn nasceu em 1200, em Gales. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Walter Hertford. Ela faleceu em 1240, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Hertford Mnn родилась в 1200 г. в местности Уэльс. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Walter Hertford. Она умерла в 1240 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Hertford Mnn nació en 1200, en Gales. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Walter Hertford. Murió en 1240, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
